text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You’ve been approved as a moderator. Please review the team guidelines and moderation handbook when you get a moment.
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You’ve been approved as an event_helper. Glad to have you helping with events — please check the event coordination notes when you can.
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You’ve been approved as a mentor. Thanks for joining — please take a look at the mentoring resources and intro materials.
